original_image_tags: A faded pink paper document with text visible in reverse (bleed-through from the other side). The document is a receipt acknowledgment form. There are two hole-punch marks at the top center.
Vertical blue ink stamp reading "RECEIPT TYPE UNIT" on the right side of the page.

elements.description: A scan of a document page with reversed, faint typed text. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present. The page contains several faint horizontal lines, two circular punch holes at the top, and faint vertical stamps or markings.

judge.reason: Both agree there are no photographs/sketches and describe similar faint marks, with A specifying a vertical blue stamp text and B mentioning faint vertical stamps or markings without contradiction.
